title: Simple and Compound Interest
description: Learn to calculate simple interest, compound interest, and compare them.

exercises.test: Find SI on 5000 at 8% for 3 years.
Amount if 10000 compounded annually at 10% for 2 years?
Find CI on 8000 at 5% for 2 years compounded annually.
Principal that amounts to 13200 in 2 years at 10% SI?
What is the difference between CI and SI on 10000 at 10% for 2 years?
